description: Produces a Management of Change (MoC) package: the technical basis for the change, a risk assessment of the change, temporary-change expiry, the Pre-Start-Up Safety Review (PSSR) as a hard pre-start-up gate, and document/training updates (OSHA 1910.119(l), ISO 45001 8.1.3). No start-up authorization is issued until the PSSR checklist passes. Decision-support only; a competent person must review the output.
name: management-of-change
